public_pr_draft.title: Fix pandas-dev/pandas#66050: BUG: pd.array() silently drops missing values when converting NumPy masked arrays
public_pr_draft.body:
## Summary
Preserve NumPy masked-array mask in pd.array conversion.

## Evidence
- Reproduction: python -m pytest pandas/tests/arrays/test_masked.py -q
- Test: python -m pytest pandas/tests/arrays/test_masked.py -q -> passed
- Crucible: MATCH

## Provenance
Candidate: https://github.com/pandas-dev/pandas/issues/66050

## Not verified
- Skipped test scope: full pandas test suite
- Assumption: fixture mirrors the issue shape but does not prove current upstream behavior
Generated by Project Telos OSS Proof Showcase. Public submission remains operator-gated.
